title: App-context pattern (per-record frontmatter)
description: Frontmatter of app-context/src/patterns/<slug>.md. Documents a recurring UX interaction pattern scoped to one or more Actian apps.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier for the pattern; used as the filename (minus .md) and cross-reference target.

label.description: Human-readable display name of the UX pattern.

apps.description: App slugs where this UX pattern appears.

components.description: Registry-key slugs of the DS components this pattern composes (authored; projected to the graph as ux_pattern -> component 'uses_component' edges).
